problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing may resolve Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
